turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Enquiring About a Rental Property or Housing Inspection

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I chat with you last week for the apartment in Piermont Street.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! I remember that. Are you still interested in that particular apartment, or are you looking at other properties as well?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm looking for the apartment with just one bedroom and for two people.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good! Do you have a preferred move-in date or any specific requirements for the apartment, like amenities or location details?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's not near a big street, and also, even if it's small, it's okay.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, no problem!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “They have to have a big living room and a bedroom with two beds.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that makes sense! So you’re looking for a place with a spacious living room and a bedroom that can accommodate two beds. Is there a particular budget range you have in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We are near or around to 500.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that definitely helps

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, around $2,500 per month. That’s a great starting point. Is there anything else you’d like to add, like pet policies or parking requirements?

turns.text: “Sorry.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries at all!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's 500 per week.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, understood, so around $500 per week. That definitely gives us a clearer idea. Is there a specific neighborhood or area you prefer?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe I told you something with a green area near the apartment is not too, like, noisy place, like near a street maybe can give us some noising for the crowded.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that makes perfect sense. So we’ll look for a quieter area with some green spaces nearby. Is there a particular length of lease you’re interested in, like a 12-month lease or something shorter?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I don't understand, sorry, can you repeat?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! No worries at all. I was just asking if you have a preferred lease length, like a 12-month lease, or if you’re looking for something shorter. Let me know what works best for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Trascrizione non disponibile

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, a three-month lease sounds good. That definitely gives us some flexibility. Is there anything else you’d like to add or any other questions you have in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Are there any inspection times this weekend?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! Let me check the availability for this weekend. Do you have a preferred day or time that works best for you for the inspection?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe on the early evening this Wednesday or Thursday.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds good! I’ll look into early evening slots for either Wednesday or Thursday. I’ll get that arranged for you. Is there anything else I can help you with in the meantime?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “and there is a property, is the property furnished or unfurnished?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We are talking about the Precise Apartment in Pyrmont, so...”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's furnished or not?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Some policy like pet policy or smokes policy”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can you give me this information now, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! If you have any other questions in the meantime, just let me know. I’ll be here to help!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, sorry, I would like if your pet and maybe smoke pull a roll.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries at all! I'll make sure to clarify the pet and smoking policies for you as well. I’ll gather that information and let you know shortly!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, but in general, you can smoke in the apartment with your agency or not.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: In general, most agencies do have a no-smoking policy inside the apartment. But I’ll confirm the specific details for that Pyrmont property and let you know for sure!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And, uh, how much is the bond?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! I’ll find out the specific bond amount for that apartment and let you know right away. If there’s anything else you’d like to know in the meantime, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “But can you say this to me now, because I can write you an email for everything.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “But I came here for to have a”

turns.text: Absolutely, I’m here

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “The information right now...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, I’ll definitely provide you with everything right away. I’ll confirm the pet and smoking policies, the bond amount, and all the details for you so you have it all at once. Let’s get that sorted out!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, thank you so much. I wait your email for everything.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’ll make sure to send all the details over to you as soon as possible. If you have any other questions in the meantime, just let me know. Thanks so much!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No thank you, see you on Wednesday evening.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sounds perfect! I’ll look forward to seeing you on Wednesday evening. Have a great day, and if anything comes up, just reach out. Take care!
